headline: Why ServiceNow (NOW) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of enterprise workflow automation company ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) jumped 6.2% in the morning session after Bernstein reiterated an Outperform rating, emphasizing that the company remains a foundational enterprise AI agent platform, and arguing that its core business process infrastructure is insulated from being replaced by large language models.

raw.headline: Why ServiceNow (NOW) Stock Is Trading Up Today
